title: Column cache problem with aggregate queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(value) > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'Test%';
key_bug_features: Column cache issue in aggregate queries
